text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇲🇱 Jihadist forces attempting to storm Kati, a strategically vital suburb of the capital Bamako, were decisively crushed. The Malian army and Russia's African Corps destroyed dozens of militants before they even reached the perimeter. FPV drones and motorcycle assault tactics failed to make a difference. Via: @Rybar_africa 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇲🇱 试图冲击首都巴马科战略要地卡蒂（Kati）的圣战分子被果断粉碎。马里军队和俄罗斯非洲军团在武装分子到达外围之前就消灭了数十人。FPV无人机和摩托车突击战术未能发挥作用。来源：@Rybar_africa 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the Iranian Ministry of Foreign Affairs, Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Muscat, Oman, the second leg of his 3-stop diplomatic tour to Pakistan, Oman, and Russia, to discuss the ongoing situation in the Middle East with his Omani counterparts. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据伊朗外交部发布的消息，伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已抵达阿曼马斯喀特，这是他巴基斯坦、阿曼和俄罗斯三国外交访问的第二站，旨在与阿曼同行讨论中东当前的局势。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT: "Michael A. Horowitz RT @yossi_melman: MEET THE NEW HEAD OF MOSSAD The 14th head of Mossad is expected to assume his post in two months. But his appointment by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is already stirring unease inside the 8000 workforce of the agency…" year-old technological prodigy, to disseminate false information on social media as part of an effort to mislead Hezbollah operatives and Iranian officers. Uri was never formally enlisted in the army; his recruitment was carried out without the knowledge of Gofman’s superiors in the general staff. When Israel’s internal security service, the Shin Bet (aka Shabak), detected Uri’s online activity, he was arrested on suspicion of espionage. During interrogation, he immediately identified Gofman as the person behind his recruitment. But once it became clear that the operation had crossed legal boundaries—for, among other reasons, Uri was a minor—Gofman denied ever knowing him. The teenager was left to face the consequences alone. He spent a year and a half in detention, undergoing repeated interrogations (and abuse, he said) before ultimately being fully acquitted by the court. Gofman, was reprimanded but continued his military career uninterrupted, eventually rising to become Netanyahu’s military adviser. In that role, he handled highly sensitive intelligence materials and, according to media reports, facilitated leaks aimed at shaping public perception in the aftermath of the Oct. 7, 2023 Hamas massacre—casting primary responsibility on the military for being unprepared while deflecting scrutiny from Netanyahu and his right-wing cabinet. In the meantime, Uri Elmakias has resurfaced, seeking accountability and compensation. In a recent appeal to the Supreme Court, he posed a stark question: “Is a person who left me to languish in prison for more than a year—while repeatedly misleading investigators and the court about his role in recruiting me—fit to lead one of Israel’s most important security agencies?” It’s a question a number of Israelis, including high ranking IDF and Mossad officers, are asking. Outgoing Mossad boss David Barnea is one of them. Barnea, who is set to step down in June, told the committee weighing Gofman’s appointment that a reprimand for conduct unbecoming should disqualify a candidate from promotion, “certainly for the position of Mossad chief.” “Handling sources is a profession,” Barnea told the committee, according to its summary. “There is one unit in the military that deals with it. When a commander decides to bypass procedures or military law, it has very significant implications.” tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT: "Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @yossi_melman: 迎接摩萨德新任局长 摩萨德第14任局长预计将在两个月后上任。但他被总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡任命的消息已经在该机构8000名员工内部引起了不安……” 一位年轻的技术天才，被利用在社交媒体上散布虚假信息，作为误导真主党特工和伊朗军官行动的一部分。乌里从未正式入伍；他的招募是在总参谋部戈夫曼（Gofman）上司不知情的情况下进行的。当以色列国内安全局（辛贝特，又称沙巴克）发现乌里的在线活动时，他因涉嫌间谍罪被捕。在审讯过程中，他立即指认戈夫曼是其招募者。但一旦明确该行动越过了法律界限——除其他原因外，乌里还是未成年人——戈夫曼就否认认识他。这名少年被独自留下承担后果。他在拘留所度过了一年半，经历了反复审讯（据他说还有虐待），最终被法院完全无罪释放。戈夫曼受到了训斥，但他的军事生涯并未中断，最终升任内塔尼亚胡的军事顾问。在担任该职务期间，他处理了高度敏感的情报材料，并据媒体报道，他促成了旨在塑造公众认知的泄密事件，以应对2023年10月7日哈马斯大屠杀后的局面——将准备不足的主要责任归咎于军方，同时转移了对内塔尼亚胡及其右翼内阁的审查。与此同时，乌里·埃尔马基亚斯（Uri Elmakias）重新露面，寻求问责和赔偿。在最近向最高法院的上诉中，他提出了一个尖锐的问题：“一个让我身陷囹圄一年多，同时在招募我的角色上反复误导调查人员和法院的人，是否有资格领导以色列最重要的安全机构之一？” 这是一个包括以色列国防军和摩萨德高级军官在内的许多以色列人都在问的问题。即将离任的摩萨德局长戴维·巴尼亚（David Barnea）就是其中之一。定于6月卸任的巴尼亚在向评估戈夫曼任命的委员会表示，因行为不端而受到的训斥应取消候选人的晋升资格，“对于摩萨德局长这一职位更是如此”。据委员会摘要显示，巴尼亚告诉委员会：“处理线人是一门专业。军队中有一个专门负责此事的部门。当指挥官决定绕过程序或军事法律时，会产生非常重大的影响。” 推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @yossi_melman : MEET THE NEW HEAD OF MOSSAD The 14th head of Mossad is expected to assume his post in two months. But his appointment by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is already stirring unease inside the 8000 workforce of the agency and in the public at large. Gofman is widely regarded as the most controversial, politicized, and inexperienced candidate ever chosen to head the Mossad, a man whose grasp of strategic special operations and international relations appears limited. These are not peripheral skills, of course. Over the past two decades, a Mossad chief’s deep understanding of such subjects has become central to Israel’s ability to gather intelligence on its most formidable adversaries, particularly Iran and Hezbollah. Despite completing various military and academic programs, Gofman does not speak English, a shortcoming that could hinder his ability to build rapport with the Mossad’s most important partner, the CIA. Born in 1976 in a part of the former Soviet Union that is now Belarus, he immigrated to Isral in 1990. The broad-faced, bespeckled Gofman has not expanded his linguistic skills beyond Hebrew and Russian, an unusual constraint for someone poised to lead one of the world’s most internationally engaged intelligence services. More troubling, however, are questions surrounding his moral judgment and ethical compass. Gofman has been accused on several occasions of misleading his commanders and acting without authorization. As an IDF colonel in the occupied West Bank, he ran Palestinian agents in unsanctioned, rogue activities. And he firmly believes he has the right, no matter the rules. During his military studies, Gofman wrote that a commander must at times act even without formal authority, exceeding his mandate to fulfill the perceived will of policymakers—even when that will has not been explicitly defined. He claimed to have drawn intellectual grounding for this approach from the writings of the Slovenian philosopher Slavoj Žižek, a neo-Marxist philosopher and author known for peppering his many books, articles and speeches with obscene jokes and politically incorrect provocations. In Gofman’s adaptation, a military commander operates within a “discursive space,” identifying an external “anchoring point” beyond himself and the system and acting accordingly—in other words, outside the lines. Over the past two years, Gofman has served as military secretary to Netanyahu, who dispatched him on several sensitive missions, including efforts to appease Russian President Vladimir Putin and his advisers on issues like Ukraine, Syria and Gaza. Before Gofman’s appointment, Israeli media reported that he had been interviewed by Sara Netanyahu, the prime minister’s influential wife, widely seen as the power behind her husband’s decisions. The prime minister’s office denied the allegation. What is less disputed is Gofman’s evident loyalty. He proved highly responsive to Netanyahu’s expectations and made sustained efforts to align with and carry out his increasingly authoritarian politics. In his capacity as the prime minister’s military expert, he argued that Netanyahu should be excused from testifying in his corruption trial on the grounds of “security concerns” -a position other senior officers declined to endorse. At 18, like all Israeli youths, he was drafted into compulsory military service. He aspired to join a commando unit but was instead assigned to the Armored Corps, where he would spend his entire career—never in an intelligence billet. He served first as a soldier and later as a commander, operating in Gaza and the West Bank against Palestinian militants, and in Lebanon against Hezbollah. His most senior field role came at the rank of brigadier general, when he commanded a division along the Syrian border. It was there, in 2022, that he became entangled in the most serious controversy of his career. An intelligence officer under his command covertly recruited Uri Elmakias, a 17-[...]
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @yossi_melman : 迎接摩萨德新任局长 摩萨德第14任局长预计将在两个月后上任。但他被总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡任命的消息已经在该机构8000名员工内部以及广大公众中引起了不安。戈夫曼被广泛认为是摩萨德历史上最具争议、政治化色彩最浓且经验最不足的候选人，他对战略特种作战和国际关系的理解似乎有限。当然，这些并非边缘技能。在过去的二十年里，摩萨德局长对这些主题的深刻理解已成为以色列收集其最强大对手（特别是伊朗和真主党）情报能力的核心。尽管完成了各种军事和学术课程，但戈夫曼不会说英语，这一缺陷可能会阻碍他与摩萨德最重要的合作伙伴——中央情报局（CIA）建立融洽关系。他1976年出生于前苏联的一部分（现为白俄罗斯），1990年移民以色列。面部宽阔、戴着眼镜的戈夫曼除了希伯来语和俄语外，没有扩展其他语言技能，对于一个准备领导世界上最活跃的国际情报服务机构之一的人来说，这是一个不同寻常的限制。然而，更令人担忧的是围绕他的道德判断和伦理准则的问题。戈夫曼曾多次被指控误导指挥官并擅自行动。作为以色列国防军驻被占领约旦河西岸的上校，他曾指挥巴勒斯坦特工进行未经批准的流氓活动。他坚信自己有权这样做，无论规则如何。在军事学习期间，戈夫曼写道，指挥官有时必须在没有正式授权的情况下采取行动，超越其职权范围以实现决策者感知的意愿——即使这种意愿尚未明确定义。他声称这种方法的智力基础来自斯洛文尼亚哲学家斯拉沃热·齐泽克（Slavoj Žižek）的著作，齐泽克是一位新马克思主义哲学家和作家，以在书籍、文章和演讲中穿插下流笑话和政治不正确挑衅而闻名。在戈夫曼的改编中，军事指挥官在“话语空间”内运作，识别自身和系统之外的外部“锚点”并据此行动——换句话说，越界行事。在过去的两年里，戈夫曼一直担任内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书，内塔尼亚胡曾派遣他执行多项敏感任务，包括在乌克兰、叙利亚和加沙等问题上安抚俄罗斯总统弗拉基米尔·普京及其顾问。在戈夫曼被任命之前，以色列媒体报道称他曾接受总理极具影响力的妻子萨拉·内塔尼亚胡的面试，她被广泛视为丈夫决策背后的权力核心。总理办公室否认了这一指控。争议较少的是戈夫曼明显的忠诚度。他证明了自己对内塔尼亚胡的期望反应迅速，并持续努力与他日益独裁的政治保持一致并付诸实施。作为总理的军事专家，他主张内塔尼亚胡应以“安全担忧”为由免于在腐败审判中作证——这是其他高级军官拒绝支持的立场。18岁时，像所有以色列青年一样，他被征召入伍。他渴望加入突击队，但被分配到装甲部队，他在那里度过了整个职业生涯——从未担任过情报职务。他先是作为士兵，后来作为指挥官，在加沙和约旦河西岸打击巴勒斯坦武装分子，并在黎巴嫩打击真主党。他最高级别的野战职务是准将军衔，当时他在叙利亚边境指挥一个师。正是在那里，2022年，他陷入了职业生涯中最严重的争议。他指挥下的一名情报官员秘密招募了17岁的乌里·埃尔马基亚斯（Uri Elmakias）……

text: WarMonitor They're American heroes, not North Koreans. @TheWarMonitor It's war not a luxury cruise 😂 - MrDeadlyMatt tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 他们是美国英雄，不是北朝鲜人。 @TheWarMonitor 这是战争，不是豪华游轮 😂 - MrDeadlyMatt 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @BrettErickson28 : The primary issues I see with Miad’s notorious analysis is the fundamental lack of understanding as it pertains to countries under economic warfare pressures, and the overwhelming buy-in from a Trump Administration desperate for solutions. Let’s start with the latter. Miad is smart. Full stop, irrefutable. FDD… also sharp. But the adoption of this analysis by the White House and Treasury was not made because it was the BEST analysis that existed at the time. It was the ONLY analysis that existed at the time. That’s the problem. The Trump Administration, clear as day, entered this conflict with insufficient planning, and throughout the conflict has been entirely outclassed from a STRATEGIC perspective. Iran controls the Strait, Iran has extensive asymmetric capabilities, and Iran knows that the Trump Administration is caught in a politically untenable quagmire. Miad and FDD offered the Trump Admin a solution to their poor preparation, and they took it. The issue, however, is that Miad’s analysis was not pressure tested. It didn’t have the gift of public discourse before implementation. It did not get the opportunity to be refined and adjusted. And now we see the fallout from it. The lack of understanding aspect is truly critical, and we see this playing out with the VLCC’s loading some 8M barrels from Kharg in the last two days, of which, 6M has been loaded today alone. Miad’s analysis that points to oil well shut-ins, hyperinflation, etc., operated on the core assumption that Kharg fills capacity at a rate of 1.0M-1.1M bpd, and had at the time of the blockade implementation, 13M barrels of spare capacity, thus a projection of 13 days to shut-in. The core issue that Miad misses in his analysis, is that it operates on a status quo scenario. That’s not how countries under economic pressure operate. We saw this extensively with Russia who had massive sanctions imposed after their 2022 (2014) invasion of Ukraine. Believe it or not, they didn’t simply just roll over and call it a day. They got creative. They innovated. They came up with new methods of sanctions-evasion. They mastered known methods. Iran is the exact same. Pulling a retired VLCC out of storage allowed for an additional 2M barrels to be loaded, thus extending the timeline by +2 days. Now, we have another 6M barrels loaded, +6 days. At this point, Miad is admitting that around 18M barrels can be loaded onto available tankers. There is a HUGE difference to the global economy between a 13 day timeline and a 31 day timeline. But this still doesn’t totally account for what we will see. I don’t have a crystal ball. I don’t know what Iran will do to extend this timeline further, but if one thing is clear, they will do everything they can to extend that now 31 day time horizon to 40 days. To 50 days. 60 days. And even then? It will take WEEKS if not MONTHS for it to become truly catastrophic to the point of forcing Iran to the negotiating table or creating enough public unrest for regime change movements to occur. Miad’s core premise — oil well shut-ins, hyperinflation, public unrest — is not incorrect. What is incorrect is operating on an assumption that Iran will simply roll over and call it a day. They won’t. Miad and FDD over-promised and under-delivered, and now the world will be the ones paying the price. #Iran #Oil #Sanctions #Treasury #Trump tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @BrettErickson28 : 我认为Miad臭名昭著的分析存在的主要问题是，在涉及处于经济战压力下的国家时，他从根本上缺乏理解，以及特朗普政府因急于寻求解决方案而全盘接受了这些分析。让我们从后者开始。Miad很聪明。句号，无可辩驳。FDD……也很敏锐。但白宫和财政部采纳这一分析并不是因为它当时是存在的“最佳”分析。它是当时存在的“唯一”分析。这就是问题所在。特朗普政府显然在进入这场冲突时规划不足，并且在整个冲突过程中，从战略角度来看完全被超越了。伊朗控制着海峡，伊朗拥有广泛的非对称能力，伊朗知道特朗普政府陷入了政治上站不住脚的泥潭。Miad和FDD为特朗普政府提供了解决其准备不足问题的方案，他们接受了。然而，问题在于Miad的分析没有经过压力测试。它在实施前没有经过公开讨论的洗礼。它没有机会被完善和调整。现在我们看到了由此产生的后果。缺乏理解这一方面确实至关重要，我们看到这种情况正在上演，VLCC（超大型油轮）在过去两天内从哈尔格岛装载了约800万桶石油，其中仅今天就装载了600万桶。Miad指出油井停产、恶性通货膨胀等的分析，基于一个核心假设，即哈尔格岛以每天100万至110万桶的速度满负荷运转，并且在实施封锁时有1300万桶的闲置产能，因此预测13天内停产。Miad在分析中忽略的核心问题是，它基于现状情景。处于经济压力下的国家并非如此运作。我们在2022年（2014年）入侵乌克兰后对俄罗斯实施大规模制裁时看到了这一点。信不信由你，他们并没有简单地屈服并就此罢休。他们发挥了创造力。他们进行了创新。他们想出了规避制裁的新方法。他们掌握了已知的方法。伊朗完全一样。从储存中拉出一艘退役的VLCC允许额外装载200万桶石油，从而将时间表延长了2天。现在，我们又装载了600万桶，延长了6天。在这一点上，Miad承认大约1800万桶石油可以装载到现有的油轮上。13天的时间表和31天的时间表对全球经济有着巨大的差异。但这仍然不能完全解释我们将看到的情况。我没有水晶球。我不知道伊朗会采取什么措施来进一步延长这个时间表，但如果有一点是明确的，那就是他们会尽一切努力将现在的31天时间跨度延长到40天。到50天。60天。即便如此呢？这需要数周甚至数月的时间才能变得真正灾难性，以至于迫使伊朗回到谈判桌前，或者造成足够的公众动荡以引发政权更迭运动。Miad的核心前提——油井停产、恶性通货膨胀、公众动荡——并非不正确。不正确的是基于伊朗会简单地屈服并就此罢休的假设。他们不会。Miad和FDD承诺过多而交付不足，现在世界将为此付出代价。 #伊朗 #石油 #制裁 #财政部 #特朗普 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hunagrian Prime Minister Orban announced that he will be leaving parliament after losing his Prime Ministerial campaign earlier this month. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班宣布，在本月早些时候输掉总理竞选后，他将离开议会。 @wfwitness

text: OSINTdefender First military art of the Iran War seen drawn by a U.S. Servicemember on the wall of a concrete shelter at Muwaffaq Salti Air Base in Jordan, recording around 77-85 Iranian drone and missile attacks against the base between February 28 and March 19, 2026. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048086891715510629/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在约旦穆瓦法克·萨尔蒂空军基地（Muwaffaq Salti Air Base）的一个混凝土掩体墙上，由一名美国军人绘制了伊朗战争的第一幅军事艺术作品，记录了2026年2月28日至3月19日期间针对该基地的约77-85次伊朗无人机和导弹袭击。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2048086891715510629/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has arrived in Muscat, the capital of Oman, leading a diplomatic delegation. He is scheduled to meet senior Omani officials to discuss bilateral relations and regional developments. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇴🇲 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐已率领外交代表团抵达阿曼首都马斯喀特。他计划会见阿曼高级官员，讨论双边关系和地区局势发展。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 KAN: Israeli security officials fear the understandings between Israel and Lebanon agreed in Washington could collapse, and want the U.S. to pressure the Lebanese Army to act against Hezbollah outside the Israeli security belt. The ceasefire has been violated 16 times in one week. Officials say the situation is “complicated” and without U.S. pressure on Lebanon, the deal could fall apart. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 以色列公共广播公司（KAN）：以色列安全官员担心以色列与黎巴嫩在华盛顿达成的谅解可能会破裂，并希望美国向黎巴嫩军队施压，要求其在以色列安全区外对真主党采取行动。停火协议在一周内已被违反16次。官员们表示，局势“很复杂”，如果没有美国对黎巴嫩的施压，该协议可能会瓦解。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 According to Multiple media outlets the ISF carried out a raid to arrest a generator owner in Beirut following his failure to comply with the regulations imposed by EDL (Electricte du Liban). The ISF shot warning shots in the air which sparked a wave…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 The General Directorate of State Security announced the following: As part of ongoing efforts to curb violations affecting economic security, a patrol was dispatched to apprehend a private generator owner in Beirut who had failed to comply with a summons to complete legal proceedings against him, in accordance with an order issued by the Financial Public Prosecutor. While carrying out the judicial order, the patrol was confronted by a group of civilians who obstructed the mission. As a result, some personnel fired shots into the air to disperse the crowd. No injuries were reported. An investigation has been launched under the supervision of the Military Public Prosecutor. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧 据多家媒体报道，黎巴嫩内部安全部队（ISF）在贝鲁特进行了一次突袭，逮捕了一名发电机所有者，原因是其未能遵守黎巴嫩电力公司（EDL）实施的规定。ISF鸣枪示警，引发了一波……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 国家安全总局宣布：作为遏制影响经济安全违规行为的持续努力的一部分，一支巡逻队被派往贝鲁特逮捕一名私人发电机所有者，该人未能遵守传票以完成针对他的法律程序，此举是根据金融检察官发布的命令进行的。在执行司法命令时，巡逻队遭到一群平民的阻挠。因此，一些人员向空中鸣枪以驱散人群。未报告有人员受伤。在军事检察官的监督下，调查已经启动。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 i24NEWS: Israeli PM Netanyahu is expected to travel to Washington in mid-May for a summit with the Lebanese president. The visit is planned for the week of May 11, pending the security situation and provided the fighting does not resume. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 MTV: A Lebanese official source has told the channel that Lebanon has not received any formal notification about a meeting between Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu and Lebanese President Aoun at the White House in two weeks, contrary to Israeli media reports. The source said a third preparatory meeting between Israel and Lebanon is possible to ensure productive negotiations. The U.S. and Israel expect Lebanon to present a clear plan, step or intention regarding the issue of weapons over the next three weeks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸🇱🇧 i24NEWS：以色列总理内塔尼亚胡预计将于5月中旬前往华盛顿，与黎巴嫩总统举行峰会。此次访问计划于5月11日当周进行，具体取决于安全局势，且前提是战斗不再恢复。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 MTV：一位黎巴嫩官方消息人士告诉该频道，与以色列媒体的报道相反，黎巴嫩尚未收到任何关于以色列总理内塔尼亚胡和黎巴嫩总统奥恩两周后在白宫会面的正式通知。消息人士称，以色列和黎巴嫩之间可能会举行第三次筹备会议，以确保谈判富有成效。美国和以色列预计黎巴嫩将在未来三周内就武器问题提出明确的计划、步骤或意图。@wfwitness

text: 📝 Освобождение Бочково 📝 На Бурлукском направлении части ГВ «Север» планомерно занимают рубежи в приграничье Харьковской области . Утром 25 апреля стало известно об освобождении российскими бойцами Бочково , бои за которое начались несколькими днями ранее. Главную роль в высоких (по меркам местных реалий) темпах зачистки села сыграла своевременная изоляция поля боя операторами БЛА и артиллерией, что не позволило противнику оперативно перебросить на участок резервы для «затыкания дыр» в обороне. ➡️ Параллельно с этим ВС РФ установили контроль над западной частью заказника «Северодонецкий» , который можно использовать как для накопления личного состава, так и для снабжения сил на участке. На данный момент штурмовики пытаются закрепиться в Охримовке и создать плацдарм на южном берегу Волчьей , а также атакуют в сторону Чайковки и Волоховки . ➡️ На восточном фланге направления российские войска так же стремятся установить контроль над северным берегом Волчьей . Наиболее тяжелые боестолкновения идут в окрестностях Нестерного , с высот у которого бойцы смогут простреливать переправы противника у Варваровки , создавая угрозу изоляции украинских формирований, пока еще находящихся к северу от реки. ➡️ В окрестностях освобожденного Волчанска бойцы «Севера» стремятся оттеснить противника из лесного массива на подступах к Верхней Писаревке . Также идут бои за цепь опорных пунктов к югу от Симоновки , контроль над которыми откроет штурмовикам путь для наступления на Лосевку и Шестеровку . Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 解放博奇科沃 📝 在布尔卢克方向，“北方”部队集群的部队正在有计划地占领哈尔科夫州边境地区的防线。4月25日上午，有消息称俄罗斯士兵解放了博奇科沃，对该地的争夺战于几天前开始。无人机操作员和炮兵及时切断战场，使敌方无法迅速向该区域调动预备队以“填补”防御漏洞，这在（以当地现实标准来看）极高的清剿速度中发挥了主要作用。➡️ 与此同时，俄军控制了“北顿涅茨克”自然保护区的西部，该区域既可用于集结人员，也可用于为该地区的部队提供补给。目前，突击部队正试图在奥赫里莫夫卡站稳脚跟，并在沃尔恰河（Volchya）南岸建立桥头堡，同时向柴科夫卡和沃洛霍夫卡方向发起进攻。➡️ 在该方向的东翼，俄军也力求控制沃尔恰河北岸。最激烈的战斗发生在内斯特诺耶附近，从那里的高地上，士兵们将能够射击瓦尔瓦罗夫卡附近的敌方渡口，从而威胁到目前仍位于河以北的乌克兰部队，使其陷入孤立。➡️ 在已解放的沃尔昌斯克附近，“北方”部队的士兵力求将敌军从通往上皮萨列夫卡的森林地带中驱逐出去。此外，西莫诺夫卡以南的一系列据点也在进行战斗，控制这些据点将为突击部队开辟通往洛谢夫卡和舍斯捷罗夫卡的进攻道路。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您所在部队的战果，您可以随时通过我们的反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们留言。📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump messaged a New York Post correspondent in Islamabad: “Come home!!!” @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 i24NEWS: Pakistan has reportedly abandoned hopes for resumed U.S.‑Iran peace talks in Islamabad, with strict security arrangements halted and roadblocks removed from the capital. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普向伊斯兰堡的一位《纽约邮报》记者发消息称：‘回家吧！！！’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 i24NEWS：据报道，巴基斯坦已放弃对在伊斯兰堡恢复美伊和平谈判的希望，首都已停止严格的安全安排并拆除了路障。@wfwitness

text: Faytuks News RT @KimberlyHalkett : After being locked down for two weeks, Islamabad government officials telling Al Jazeera, with the collapse of a second round of indirect talks, the outskirts of Islamabad are already being opened back up and security barriers are being taken down. tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @KimberlyHalkett：在被封锁两周后，伊斯兰堡政府官员告诉半岛电视台，随着第二轮间接谈判的破裂，伊斯兰堡郊区已经重新开放，安全屏障正在被拆除。推文

text: Nuno Felix 🤣 🤣 🤣 🇫🇷 A French tax official was arrested for selling crypto investors' home addresses and financial records to criminal networks. 41 kidnappings followed. One every 2.5 days since January 2026. The criminals didn't need to hack anything. They bought a list from someone inside the government. France is the most dangerous country in the world right now if you hold crypto and someone knows about it 💀 Source: Le Mond - Mario Nawfal tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 🤣 🤣 🤣 🇫🇷 一名法国税务官员因向犯罪网络出售加密货币投资者的家庭住址和财务记录而被捕。随后发生了41起绑架事件。自2026年1月以来，平均每2.5天发生一起。罪犯根本不需要黑进任何系统。他们从政府内部人员那里买了一份名单。如果你持有加密货币且有人知道，法国现在是世界上最危险的国家 💀 来源：世界报 - Mario Nawfal 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @shellykittleson : Mine for @TheAtlantic on being snatched off a Baghdad street on March 31, beaten, blindfolded and ziptied, and spending over a week as a hostage in handcuffs and in pain from multiple rib fractures sustained the first day. Alhamdullilah I am out now and healing. And I still love Iraq, dearly. https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/2026/04/kidnapped-iraq-shelly-kittleson-iran/686896/ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @shellykittleson：我在《大西洋月刊》上发表的文章，讲述了3月31日在巴格达街头被绑架、殴打、蒙眼、捆绑，并作为人质被戴上手铐关押了一周多，第一天就因多根肋骨骨折而痛苦不堪的经历。感谢真主，我现在出来了，正在康复中。我依然深爱着伊拉克。https://www.theatlantic.com/ideas/2026/04/kidnapped-iraq-shelly-kidtleson-iran/686896/ 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump via Truth Social: I just cancelled the trip of my representatives going is Islamabad, Pakistan, to meet with the Iranians. Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work! Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their “leadership.” Nobody knows who is in charge, including them. Also, we have all the cards, they have none! If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!! tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普总统通过“真实社交”（Truth Social）表示：我刚刚取消了我的代表前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与伊朗人会面的行程。在旅行上浪费了太多时间，工作量太大！此外，他们的“领导层”内部存在巨大的内斗和混乱。没人知道谁在负责，包括他们自己。而且，我们掌握了所有筹码，他们一个都没有！如果他们想谈，他们只需要打个电话！！！推文

text: WarMonitor As pointed out yesterday, Trump didn't cancel... they got stood up. This isn't the first time, either. Trump says he canceled a planned trip to Islamabad for his representatives to meet with Iranian officials, citing “too much time wasted on traveling, too much work.” Note: The talks were never scheduled, and Iranian officials have said they had no plans to meet with the U.S. https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2048077063652086060/photo/1 - MeidasTouch tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 正如昨天指出的，特朗普并没有取消……他们是被放鸽子了。这也不是第一次了。特朗普称他取消了代表团前往伊斯兰堡与伊朗官员会面的计划行程，理由是“在旅行上浪费了太多时间，工作量太大”。注：谈判从未安排过，伊朗官员也表示他们没有与美国会面的计划。https://twitter.com/MeidasTouch/status/2048077063652086060/photo/1 - MeidasTouch 推文

text: Faytuks News Iran's Foreign Minister: "Have yet to see if the U.S. is truly serious about diplomacy" Very fruitful visit to Pakistan, whose good offices and brotherly efforts to bring back peace to our region we very much value. Shared Iran's position concerning workable framework to permanently end the war on Iran. Have yet to see if the U.S. is truly serious about diplomacy. - Seyed Abbas Araghchi tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 伊朗外交部长：“还有待观察美国是否真的认真对待外交。” 对巴基斯坦的访问非常有成效，我们非常重视巴基斯坦为恢复我们地区的和平所做的斡旋和兄弟般的努力。分享了伊朗关于永久结束对伊战争的可行框架的立场。还有待观察美国是否真的认真对待外交。 - Seyed Abbas Araghchi 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump announced that he has cancelled the trip of his representatives to Islamabad, Pakistan, for talks with Iran. “Too much time wasted on travelling, too much work!” he wrote. Citing “tremendous infighting and confusion” within…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump messaged a New York Post correspondent in Islamabad: “Come home!!!” @wfwitness

text: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 NEW: Trump told New York Post reporter Caitlin Doornbos, who has been in Islamabad for two and a half weeks, to ‘come home’ ‘President Trump told me this evening it’s time to leave Islamabad. U.S.-Iran talks round two are off. Thank you Pakistan ❤️ ’ It seems that diplomatic engagement between Iran and the U.S. has definitely come to an end, for now. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 / 🇵🇰 最新消息：特朗普告诉已在伊斯兰堡待了两周半的《纽约邮报》记者凯特琳·多恩博斯（Caitlin Doornbos）“回家吧”。“特朗普总统今晚告诉我，是时候离开伊斯兰堡了。美伊第二轮谈判取消。谢谢你，巴基斯坦 ❤️” 看来伊朗和美国之间的外交接触目前确实已经结束了。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: IRGC: Managing and controlling the Strait of Hormuz is an inevitable strategic priority for Iran.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：管理和控制霍尔木兹海峡是伊朗不可避免的战略优先事项。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 The Israeli military says it killed alleged Hamas members who took part in the 7 October attacks, including a Hamas platoon commander, and a member of Hamas’s military intelligence unit during operations in Gaza this week. The killed fighters were identified as Khazem Rami Ali Aidi (participated in the October 7 attack), Maher Tantawi (Hamas military intelligence), and Ibrahim Mansour (Hamas platoon commander). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列军方称，本周在加沙的行动中，击毙了据称参与了10月7日袭击的哈马斯成员，其中包括一名哈马斯排长和一名哈马斯军事情报部门成员。被击毙的武装人员身份确认为：Khazem Rami Ali Aidi（参与了10月7日袭击）、Maher Tantawi（哈马斯军事情报部门）和Ibrahim Mansour（哈马斯排长）。@wfwitness

text: Pakistan has become central to U.S.–Iran talks after appealing directly to Trump, who extended the ceasefire. Trump’s view of Pakistan appears highly positive. According to officials, “Trump loves winners, and he’s impressed.” He was reportedly struck by Pakistan’s military and performance, saying, “Who are these Pakistanis? It’s a small country… they’ve clobbered the Indians.” Source: The Hill
text_zh: 巴基斯坦在直接向特朗普呼吁并延长停火协议后，已成为美伊会谈的核心。特朗普对巴基斯坦的看法似乎非常积极。据官员称，“特朗普喜欢赢家，他印象深刻。”据报道，他对巴基斯坦的军事和表现感到震惊，称：“这些巴基斯坦人是谁？这是一个小国……他们把印度人打得落花流水。”来源：国会山报

text: Personally, if a wanted individual is a drug trafficker, a murderer, or a high-profile thief, I believe they should never be allowed to be free I have never once attacked the army, regardless of the methods they used. Yet, I do not recall Speaker Berri stepping forward to defend those wanted individuals, nor did he rise up in protest as the young men. Are we to understand, then, that you only want the State to apply to a specific sect, against the Shia only you sons of 60 whores
text_zh: 就我个人而言，如果一名被通缉的人员是毒贩、杀人犯或高调的窃贼，我认为他们绝不应该被允许获得自由。无论军队使用什么手段，我从未攻击过军队。然而，我不记得贝里议长曾站出来为那些被通缉的人辩护，他也没有像年轻人那样起来抗议。那么我们是否可以理解为，你只希望国家针对特定教派，只针对什叶派？你们这些60个妓女的儿子。

text: I hate Lebanon and hate my fellow Lebanese that's why I don't like to post about internal politics a lot but here is one post Today Lebanese State security went to Sunni Neighborhoods in Beirut to arrest someone who was gauging price and forming a monopoly. He was arrested Everyone from the Sunni Lebanese PM to Sunni MPs in the parliament to the literal Mufti of Lebanon (Sunni) issued condemnation and protected the criminal. They vowed to arrest the criminal? No, they vowed to arrest the Lebanese state security personnel doing their job. On the other hand...there north in Baalbek and Beqaa Some time ago, the army launched a raid in Baalbek; they struck wanted individuals multiple times using airstrikes—a tactic they were employing for the first time—killing them in the process. Airstrikes against Lebanese Shia. They also raided homes, destroyed gathering halls, and opened fire on families. The Lebanese army even demolished houses in that area.
text_zh: 我讨厌黎巴嫩，也讨厌我的黎巴嫩同胞，这就是为什么我不喜欢发布太多关于内部政治的内容，但这里有一条帖子。今天，黎巴嫩国家安全局前往贝鲁特的逊尼派社区，逮捕了一名哄抬物价和搞垄断的人。他被捕了。从逊尼派黎巴嫩总理到议会中的逊尼派议员，再到黎巴嫩的穆夫提（逊尼派），每个人都发表了谴责并保护了这名罪犯。他们发誓要逮捕罪犯吗？不，他们发誓要逮捕执行公务的黎巴嫩国家安全人员。另一方面……在北部的巴勒贝克和贝卡，前段时间，军队在巴勒贝克发动了突袭；他们多次使用空袭打击被通缉的人员——这是他们首次采用的战术——并在过程中杀死了他们。针对黎巴嫩什叶派的空袭。他们还突袭了民宅，摧毁了聚会大厅，并向家庭开火。黎巴嫩军队甚至拆毁了该地区的房屋。

text: Trump sends a DM to a New York Post reporter who is in Islamabad: Come home!!!
text_zh: 特朗普给一名身在伊斯兰堡的《纽约邮报》记者发了私信：回家！！！

text: ⭕️ Hezbullah released footage of the attack that shot down the Israeli Hermes-450 drone that was violating the ceasefire and the Lebanese sovereignty The drone that killed many of our brothers and sisters by burning them to death The drone that destroyed many of our houses
text_zh: ⭕️ 真主党发布了击落以色列赫尔墨斯-450无人机的袭击视频，该无人机当时正在违反停火协议并侵犯黎巴嫩主权。这架无人机曾通过将我们的许多兄弟姐妹活活烧死而杀害了他们，这架无人机摧毁了我们的许多房屋。

text: Large scale Israeli demolition of civilian houses in Taybeh town. The most documented war crime in this century and no one is doing anything
text_zh: 以色列在泰贝镇大规模拆毁民房。这是本世纪记录最详尽的战争罪行，却没有人采取任何行动。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇸 Polling stations have opened across parts of the Israeli-occupied West Bank and central Gaza, including Deir el-Balah, as Palestinians vote in municipal elections held for the first time since the Gaza war. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇸 Approximately 1.3 million Palestinians are voting in local authority elections in the West Bank for the first time in five years, and for the first time in 20 years in Deir al‑Balah in the central Gaza Strip. Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas voted in Al‑Bireh, near Ramallah, and said that November elections for the Palestinian National Council will be held, stressing that Gaza is an integral part of a future Palestinian state. Hamas and Fatah representatives recently held rare meetings in Gaza to discuss differences. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇸 随着巴勒斯坦人在加沙战争以来的首次市政选举中投票，以色列占领的西岸部分地区和加沙中部（包括代尔巴拉赫）的投票站已经开放。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇸 约130万巴勒斯坦人正在西岸参加地方当局选举，这是五年来首次，也是加沙地带中部代尔巴拉赫20年来的首次。巴勒斯坦总统马哈茂德·阿巴斯在拉马拉附近的阿尔比雷投票，并表示将于11月举行巴勒斯坦全国委员会选举，强调加沙是未来巴勒斯坦国不可分割的一部分。哈马斯和法塔赫代表最近在加沙举行了罕见的会议，讨论分歧。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi described his visit to Pakistan as “very fruitful”, valuing Pakistan’s good offices and brotherly efforts to restore peace to the region. Araghchi said he shared Iran’s position on a workable framework to permanently end the war, adding: “We have yet to see if the U.S. is truly serious about diplomacy.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希称他对比基斯坦的访问“非常有成效”，重视巴基斯坦为恢复该地区和平所做的斡旋和兄弟般的努力。阿拉格希表示，他分享了伊朗关于永久结束战争的可行框架的立场，并补充说：“我们还有待观察美国是否真的认真对待外交。” @wfwitness

text: Viktor Orbán will step back from parliament after losing the April 12 election, ending 16 years in power. He said he’s not needed in parliament but will focus on reorganizing his party, Fidesz.
text_zh: 维克多·欧尔班在4月12日的选举中失利后将退出议会，结束其16年的执政。他表示议会不再需要他，但他将专注于重组他的政党——青民盟。

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says he has cancelled U.S. representatives going to Islamabad to meet with the Iranians. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2048078011447071062/photo/1 tweet

text: Trump: I just cancelled the trip of my representatives going is Islamabad, Pakistan, to meet with the Iranians. Too much time wasted on traveling, too much work! Besides which, there is tremendous infighting and confusion within their “leadership.” Nobody knows who is in charge, including them. Also, we have all the cards, they have none! If they want to talk, all they have to do is call!!!
text_zh: 特朗普：我刚刚取消了我的代表团前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡与伊朗人会面的行程。浪费了太多时间在旅行上，工作太多了！此外，他们的“领导层”内部存在巨大的内斗和混乱。没人知道谁负责，包括他们自己。而且，我们掌握了所有的牌，他们一张都没有！如果他们想谈，他们只需要打电话！！！

text: Nuno Felix RT @lisaabramowicz1 : The world’s oil buffers are rapidly being depleted, with crude inventories poised to reach the lowest levels on record even if the Strait of Hormuz reopens in full by the end of this month: GS’s Daan Struyven & team https://twitter.com/lisaabramowicz1/status/2048031066535903439/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @lisaabramowicz1：全球石油缓冲储备正在迅速耗尽，即使霍尔木兹海峡在本月底前全面重新开放，原油库存也将达到历史最低水平：高盛的 Daan Struyven 及其团队 https://twitter.com/lisaabramowicz1/status/2048031066535903439/photo/1 推文
